item.title: China-Nexus Actor UNC6508 Targets Medical Research
item.dc:creator: Google Threat Intelligence Group
item.description: GTIG identified UNC6508 using spearphishing (T1566.001) and exploiting CVE-2025-12345 for initial access. Persistence via T1053.005.

item.title: ShinyHunters and UNC6240 Exploit Oracle PeopleSoft
item.dc:creator: Mandiant and Google Threat Intelligence Group (GTIG)
item.description: Active extortion attributed to UNC6240 exploiting CVE-2024-9999. Credential access mapped to T1003.

item.title: APT 41 Tooling Update
item.dc:creator: Mandiant
item.description: FIN7 and APT 41 overlap. No new CVEs.
